zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasine Raleigh於大約1366年出生在英國英格蘭戴文法爾時，她的父親John Raleigh28歲，母親Joan Pettit24歲。她於1384年與John Chichester在英國戴文皮爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1402年8月31日在英國英格蘭戴文斯普頓享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文阿爾林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasine Raleigh于大约1366年出生在英国英格兰戴文法爾时，她的父亲John Raleigh28岁，母亲Joan Pettit24岁。她于1384年与John Chichester在英国戴文皮爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1402年8月31日在英国英格兰戴文斯普頓享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文阿爾林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Raleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawleigh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Orlo.
English: variant of   Raleigh  , reflecting a common pronunciation.

variants.name: Riley
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

nameMeanings.name: Thomasine
meanings: Hebrew: A twin; Thomasine is a female version.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasine Raleigh was born about 1366, in Farleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Raleigh, was 28 and her mother, Joan Pettit, was 24. She married John Chichester in 1384, in Pilton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 31 August 1402, in Spreyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Arlington, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasine Raleigh est née environ 1366, à Farleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Raleigh, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Pettit, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Chichester en 1384, à Pilton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 31 août 1402, à Spreyton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Arlington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasine Raleigh um 1366 in Farleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Raleigh 28 und ihre Mutter Joan Pettit 24. Sie hat 1384 in Pilton, Devon, England John Chichester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 31. August 1402 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Spreyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Arlington, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Raleigh è nata il circa 1366 nel Farleigh, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Raleigh, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Joan Pettit, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Chichester nel 1384, nel Pilton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 31 agosto 1402, nel Spreyton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Arlington, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasine Raleighが約1366年にイギリスイギリスデボンファルレイグで生まれた時，父John Raleighは28歳，母Joan Pettitは24歳であった。1384年にイギリスデボンピルトンでJohn Chichesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1402年8月31日にイギリスイギリスデボンスプレイトンで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンアルリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasine Raleigh(이)가 대략 1366년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 패를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Raleigh(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Pettit(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1384년 영국 데폰 피턴에서 John Chichester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 8월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스플리턴에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 알링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Raleigh nasceu aproximadamente 1366, em Farleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Raleigh, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Pettit, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Chichester em 1384, em Pilton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1402, em Spreyton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Arlington, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasine Raleigh родилась около 1366 г. в местности фарлиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Raleigh было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Pettit, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Chichester в 1384 г. в местности пилтон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 31 августа 1402 г. в местности спритон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности арлингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasine Raleigh nació aproximadamente 1366, en Farleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Raleigh, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Pettit, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Chichester en 1384, en Pilton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1402, en Spreyton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Arlington, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
